scene: داخل مطبخ المنزل، يجلس الأخ الأكبر لطالب جامعي على الطاولة، مشغولًا بدراسته على اللابتوب. بجانبه، توجد علبة من وجبة البيك اكسبرس مفتوحة، تنبعث منها رائحة الفلافل الشهية. يضع طالب الجامعة يده على بطنه إشارة لوجود جوع، بينما يمد يده بتلقائية دون أن يرفع نظره عن المذاكرة، ليتناول قطعة فلافل من العلبة. في هذه اللحظة، تدخل الأم للمطبخ، تراقب المشهد بابتسامة داعمة، متفهمة أن وجبة البيك أصبحت جزءًا من روتينهم اليومي للدراسة.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open]
The reference image teaches the فلافل brand identity. Identity is invariant — splash composition, product angle, and light are creative choices.
Identity DNA: «CLIENT: locked identity of فلافل — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
INTEGRATION: The product and the splash share one high-speed strobe event. Droplets cast colored reflection onto the product's nearest edges; the atmospheric haze between droplets and product shares the light volume; any suspended companion sits in the same focus plane.

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: high-speed flash, photoreal. Material truth: Deep-fried falafel — a dark-golden-to-brown craggy crisp shell with a coarse cracked surface (catches hard light as scattered hotspots), revealing a soft green-flecked herby interior when broken; served with glossy white tahini/garlic sauce and soft flatbread. Drier, denser, more matte crust than the chicken breading.. Droplets vary chaotically — some spherical, some elongating, some mid-deformation; authentic refraction and surface tension. No cartoon water, no over-stylized symmetric splash.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Each falafel ball ≈ 3.5–4.5 cm diameter. Scale-anchor = served as a cluster on/with soft flatbread and a dipping cup; a single ball ≈ one-third the diameter of the ALBAIK bun (≈ 9–10 cm), i.e. roughly the size of a large date or a folded fingertip.. Render any suspended companions (beans, fruit, garnish) at honest small scale relative to the product — accents, not oversized.

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Hero proximity — product ~30-40% of frame at the centre of the splash ring, tight enough that the ring reaches the frame edges.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived]
Deep Warm, deep, and saturated — a center-lit radial glow (bright core behind the hero food, falling to dark maroon/charred edges), giving a dramatic studio-ember mood rather than a flat pastel. The spicy/'حراق' line darkens to near-black with orange ember sparks; occasion posts swap to a deep starry navy. Tone is consistently rich and high-contrast, never light/airy except the deliberate clean-white promo cuts. radial field. Anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries.. The splash liquid's colour is derived from the product (cold/clear vs hot/amber vs the product's own liquid). Field colours from Two brand-owned color fields only: (1) ALBAIK signature deep brick-crimson red (≈ a rich tomato-to-maroon red, NOT a generic KFC bright red — it reads slightly cooler and deeper), almost always rendered as a center-bright radial glow falling to dark maroon at the edges; (2) ALBAIK golden-yellow (the price-disc / wordmark / packaging-pattern yellow). A deep navy-blue field is the owned occasion variant (night/Eid/Ramadan/fish). White is the owned neutral (the packaging bag). A color-blocking chain may fill the frame ONLY from {crimson-red, golden-yellow, navy-blue, white} — never a borrowed reference red/orange.. No colours foreign to the brand.

[LIGHT & LENS · dramatic, mood not spec]
Hard high-speed strobe energy. Model chooses key direction (side rake or top halo), rim placement and warmth matched to the product (warm rim for hot products, cool for cold), atmospheric haze. Deep radial backdrop fading toward black. The primary brand colour catches the strobe. Lens: macro for splash texture; aperture deep enough that ring and product stay crisp.

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): داخل مطبخ المنزل، يجلس الأخ الأكبر لطالب جامعي على الطاولة، مشغولًا بدراسته على اللابتوب. بجانبه، توجد علبة من وجبة البيك اكسبرس مفتوحة، تنبعث منها رائحة الفلافل الشهية. يضع طالب الجامعة يده على بطنه إشارة لوجود جوع، بينما يمد يده بتلقائية دون أن يرفع نظره عن المذاكرة، ليتناول قطعة فلافل من العلبة. في هذه اللحظة، تدخل الأم للمطبخ، تراقب المشهد بابتسامة داعمة، متفهمة أن وجبة البيك أصبحت جزءًا من روتينهم اليومي للدراسة.
The product caught at its moment of action — a ring of its derived liquid frozen mid-motion around it, with optional derived companions suspended within. Model chooses: ring character (complete halo, crown arc, partial asymmetric, explosive scatter); companion positions; camera angle; product orientation within the splash.

[SUBJECT]
Liquid rendered true to the product — correct colour, true specular highlights, edge tension. The product stays dry — splash is around it, never on it.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product. No humans. Splash around, never on, the product. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal high-speed product photography. Editorial grade toward ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries.. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian. real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies any culturally-specific companion (e.g. cardamom for Arabic coffee per CS-21). warmer gold/sand/amber tones warms the rim. No alcohol cues; food/beverage rules per CS-21.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary ring shape/density, companion positions, product orientation, light direction, camera angle. Hold constant: brand-derived palette, product-matched liquid, dramatic strobe, material texture. Each render a different instant of the same action.

blocks: BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, composition open
